overview: Historically accurate medieval RPG set in 15th century Bohemia. Features realistic combat, no magic, complex quest design, and emphasis on player skill development through practice.

terminology.Feint: Fake attack to open enemy guard

commonQuestions: How does the combat system work?
How do I save my game?
How do I improve my skills?
Where do I get better armor?
How do I make money early game?
Should I kill or spare this NPC?
How do I pass this speech check?
insiderTips: Practice combat with trainer - you WILL be bad at first, that's intentional
Save often with Savior Schnapps - limited saves are by design
Reading skill required to read books - visit scribe early
Dirty clothes reduce charisma - bathe and repair gear regularly
Skills improve through use - want better swords? Use swords
Don't fight multiple enemies at once early - run or use bow
Steal carefully - getting caught ruins reputation permanently
Alchemy is powerful but requires recipe knowledge

progressionSystem.skills: Learn by doing - each action improves related skill
progressionSystem.stats: Improve through leveling skills in that category
progressionSystem.equipment: Buy, loot, or earn through quests
progressionSystem.reputation: Based on actions in each location

combatTips.defense: Master strike timing is crucial for survival
combatTips.stamina: Manage carefully - exhaustion leaves you vulnerable
combatTips.armor: Heavier is better but affects stamina
